Notice Of Motion And Motion For Mandatory Dismissal Based Upon Failure To Prosecute Or, In The Alternative, Discretionary Dismissal
Off Calendar Aug-27-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

RESPONDENTS DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS, DIVISION's Motion For Mandatory Dismissal Based Upon Failure To Prosecute Or, In The Alternative, Discretionary Dismissal.

Respondent Department of Industrial Relations, Division of Labor Standards Enforcement's motion for mandatory dismissal based upon failure to prosecute is granted. No opposition filed.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
